entities.name: David Speigel
entities.context: Speaker at a meeting V attended; shared story about friendship group dynamics and the 'Lewis' concept

entities.name: Lewis
entities.context: Member of David Speigel's friendship group; wealthy, doesn't need sleep, organizes annual trips for the group

entities.name: Find Your Lewis
entities.context: Framework about relationship-building requiring a coordinator/driver figure who handles logistics and commitment

entities.name: Pragmatism Over Idealism
entities.context: David Speigel's revealed value system - focusing on what actually works rather than abstract ideals

relationships.context: Part of the same friendship group that takes annual trips together
Shared this framework as opening story; applies it by trying to become 'the Lewis' in other contexts
His storytelling style and advice reveals preference for practical wisdom over idealism
